programme.title: A Scottish Love Scheme

programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: Gotta See It
programme.desc: Must-see moments from the world of sports.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: Blue Jays face the White Sox at the Rate Field in a Series Finale at the Rate Field. Davis Martin looks to stifle the Blue Jays bats and secure a home win for the south siders while the White Sox aim to defend and improve recent streak.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob spends the morning with his good friend Pete. The duo have a banner day fishing the backcountry.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: Jared hooks up with the legendary Capt. James Peters of Osprey Charters and expects a guaranteed success in one of the best inshore fisheries in the world.

programme.title: MLF General Tire Team Series

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane revisits waters that he fished decades ago, but can he pull a giant largemouth from the depths?

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit largemouth bass in this rocky lake.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: The unpredictable nature of fishing is why the sport is, well, awesome. That's the opinion of former professional angler Mark Zona, who demonstrates on his Outdoor Channel show the allure of not knowing what's going to happen with each cast. Episodes might start with a targeted species, but that's where the scripts end. What happens after that -- the successes and the failures, the magic and the m

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: The saying goes that all good things come to an end. However on this trip home from the big blue off Madagascar, the open waters provided a number of species willing to get the reels screaming and adrenaline spiking...

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The Kruger Park is as wild as any natural environment can get. Gareth and Tommo get invited by the scientific services to take part in research of the Sabie River, their survey samples waters that have never been fished before.

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The African Tiger Fish has a well-earned reputation as the ultimate freshwater game fish, lightning quick, agile, powerful, and deadly, which makes it the ideal candidate to lure with Live Bait.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: We head off to the untamed wilds of Zambia's Lozi Kingdom to take on the monsters of the Zambezi River. From tigerfish to nembwe, this area never fails to provide trophy fishing.
